steps.title: Set up the ratio relationship
steps.content: The ratio of $AB$ to $CD$ is $6$ to $1$, which means $AB$ is $6$ times as long as $CD$. We can express this as: $$AB = 6 \cdot CD$$

steps.title: Substitute and solve for CD
steps.content: Substituting $AB = 132$ inches: $$132 = 6 \cdot CD$$ Dividing both sides by $6$: $$CD = \frac{132}{6} = 22$$ The length of line segment $CD$ is $22$ inches. That matches the correct answer - A is correct.
